headline_seed: US intercepts Iranian drones fired at Bahrain, Kuwait, retaliates by striking radar sites - Fox News
draft_text:
U.S. forces shot down 4 Iranian drones and struck radar sites on Qeshm Island. Iran fired 7 ballistic missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain — 6 intercepted. BBC News and NBC News both confirm no U.S. personnel were harmed.

And that's the mews.
